NTC OF MTN TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES & FOR SANCTIONS, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. AS TO NOS. 40-45, THE MOTION IS DENIED AS THE INTERROGATORIES ARE IRRELEVANT. AS TO NOS. 46 AND 47, THE MOTION IS MOOT AS SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. AS TO NOS. 48-56, THE MOTION IS DENIED AS THE INTERROGATORIES ARE IRRELEVANT. AS TO NOS. 63, 64, 65, 66, THE MOTION IS DENIED AS THE INTERROGATORIES ARE OVERLY BROAD. AS TO NO. 92, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS THE RESPONSE IS INSUFFICIENT AS DILIGENT SEARCH AND REASONABLE INQUIRY ARE REQUIRED AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT OPPOSED THE MOTION AS TO THIS INTERROGATORY. AS TO NOS. 93, 106-108, 111, AND 112, THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS A SEPARATE RESPONSE IS REQUIRED. AS TO NOS. 115 AND 116, THE MOTION IS DENIED AS THE INTERROGATORIES ARE OVERLY BROAD AS INSPECTIONS AND EXAMINATIONS UNDERTAKEN BY CONSULTANTS ARE PRIVILEGED. WHILE THE MOTION EXCLUDES INSPECTIONS AND EXAMINATIONS UNDERTAKEN BY CONSULTANTS, IT IS NOT CLEAR WHAT IS BEING REQUESTED. AS TO NO. 122, THE MOTION IS DENIED AS IRRELEVANT. FURTHER RESPONSES SHALL BE MADE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Steven Cavalli, Esq. for Petitioner: Laura Parente, present as Guardian at litem for: Cynthia Guerrero, Maria Vallejo and Omar Vallejo, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.

Maria Vallejo: Settlement $54,040.00, Attorney's Fees $13,266.00, Costs $975.00, Net Balance $39,799.00
Omar Vallejo: Settlement $42,460.00, Attorney's Fees $10,424.00, Costs $765.00, Net Balance $31,271.00
